B. Planning, Implementing, and Supervising Therapeutic Tasks and Activities 
Designed to Restore Sensory-Integrative Function. 

EXAMPLE: Providing motor and tactile activities to increase sensory output and 
improve response for a stroke patient with functional loss resulting in a distorted body 
image.
